description: You are a DevOps engineer at AcmeCorp tasked with deploying a secure private Docker registry and migrating application images. Deploy a registry container named 'acme-registry' using the 'registry:2' image on port 5443 (mapped to 443) with TLS and Basic Auth enabled. The setup requires a 365-day self-signed TLS certificate for 'registry.acme.local' in '~/projects/registry-setup/certs/' and an htpasswd file in '~/projects/registry-setup/auth/' containing users 'admin' (password: 'RegistryAdmin2024') and 'ci-bot' (password: 'PipelineToken99'). Use a volume named 'registry-data' for persistent storage at '/var/lib/registry' and ensure the local Docker daemon trusts 'registry.acme.local:5443'. Migrate 'acme-api:latest', 'acme-frontend:latest', and 'acme-proxy:latest' to the new registry as 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0', 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/web-frontend:v3.0.1', and 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/reverse-proxy:v1.0.0' respectively. Additionally, provide a script at '~/projects/registry-setup/catalog.sh' that authenticates as 'admin' to query the registry API and list all repositories and tags. Verify the deployment by successfully pulling 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0' to a clean local environment. Note: 'registry.acme.local' is already mapped to 127.0.0.1 in /etc/hosts.
